caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and a large, grey, stylized wig that stands upright. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. The background is a wall filled with numerous framed photographs and apparel, including a visible "LEE" brand label. On-screen logos featuring a microphone icon and the text "TALK JOY" and "PODCAST" appear in the lower corners of the scene. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing and his head shifting slightly as he talks. He remains in the same seated position throughout the clip, facing toward the left side of the frame while gesturing with his facial expressions during the conversation.
